features.title: Initial harness setup
features.description: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, init.sh, feature_list.json, PROGRESS.md, and docs/ exist. init.sh exits 0 on a fresh clone.
verification: Run ./init.sh from a fresh clone; it exits 0
Run npm run verify; it exits 0
feature_list.json validates against scripts/feature-list-check.js

features.title: Maestro end-to-end verification
features.description: Maestro toolchain wired into the harness so feature verification lists can include real-simulator runs. Smoke flow exercises the default Expo home tab.
verification: Install maestro: curl -Ls 'https://get.maestro.mobile.dev' | bash
Boot an iOS simulator: npm run sim:ios
Start the app on the sim: npm run ios
Run the flow: npm run e2e
Confirm exit code 0 and screenshot/JUnit artifacts in tmp/diagnostics/
features.notes: Scaffolding landed via PR #2. Flipping to done needs an actual simulator run.

features.title: Home screen shows project name and harness status
features.description: Default tab renders the project name and feature counts read from feature_list.json at bundle time.
verification: npm run start; open on iOS sim, Android emulator, or web
Home tab shows 'rn-harness' and the done/total feature counts
Render test covers the counts

features.title: Feature list screen
features.description: Second tab renders every feature with id, title, status, and a coloured status pill. Read-only.
verification: Tab reachable from the bottom tab bar
All features in feature_list.json appear
Status pill colours: todo=grey, in_progress=blue, blocked=red, done=green
RTL renders correctly (toggle device language to Arabic)
Render test covers the rendered list
features.notes: Use FlatList or FlashList — never .map over a long array of Views.

features.title: Simplify harness to doc-aligned form
features.description: Strip the project back to the lecture-prescribed minimum: split claude-progress.md into PROGRESS.md + DECISIONS.md, delete speculative lib/__tests__, delete redundant docs (UI/VERIFICATION/WHY_HARNESS_FOR_RN/E2E_TESTING), slim survivor docs, drop redundant npm scripts.
verification: claude-progress.md is gone; PROGRESS.md and DECISIONS.md exist
lib/, __tests__/, scripts/feature_list.schema.json are removed
docs/{UI,VERIFICATION,WHY_HARNESS_FOR_RN,E2E_TESTING}.md are removed
docs/HARNESS.md, docs/SESSION.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/RN_PLATFORM.md are under ~100 lines each
npm run verify exits 0
./init.sh exits 0 (tails PROGRESS.md)
scripts/check-clean-state.sh passes
features.notes: Once merged, feat/ci-001-actions needs to rebase and update scripts/harness-ci-checks.sh to look at PROGRESS.md instead of claude-progress.md.
